© 2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.
This action plan is meant to supplement the Search Engine Optimization Manual
(10xdownload.com/seo1) to make sure you’re crystal clear on the actions to take to get your
desired results. When additional details are needed, refer to the manual or utilize the
resources provided.
While this is meant to empower you to get up and running, keep in mind that any number
of parts of this process can be outsourced or run by an agency. Good luck!
SET UP SEARCH CONSOLE AND DO BASIC CHECKS	STEP
1
Google provides a free tool called Search Console that allows you to track your
rankings and organic search activity. Your first priority is to login and make
sure that your pages are being indexed and that you have no errors on your
pages.
• Setup and Research Checklist (10xdownload.com/seo6)
• Google Search Console Account (10xresource.com/seo8)
• Search Console Tutorial Video (10xresource.com/seo2)
• Google Search Results Tutorial (10xresource.com/seo1)
• Google SEO Starter Guide (10xresource.com/seo18)
• Google Getting Site Indexed (10xresource.com/seo19)
Recommended Resource:
Create your strategy, optimize your website, and
start ranking your pages on the search engines.

CONFIGURE YOUR GOOGLE BUSINESS PROFILE	STEP
2
Each business gets a free profile on Google, highlighting your company when
people search for it and helping you appear in results. Your profile may have
been created automatically, if that is the case you will need to claim it to edit.
Each business type offers unique functionality, but here are a few of the
things you can do with your profile…
• Google Business Profile Setup (10xresource.com/seo9)
• Google Business Profile Tutorial (10xresource.com/seo3)
• Google Search Console Help (10xresource.com/seo27)
• Google Business Training (10xresource.com/seo21)
Recommended Resource:
Add basic business information
Share your logo and photos
Collect and reply to reviews
Create offers and events
Message with potential customers
Post an FAQs section
COMPLETE ANY BASIC WEBSITE OPTIMIZATIONS	STEP
3
If your overall website does not perform, you have no chance of ranking. Start
by performing a website speed test. Simply put, the simpler your website, the
faster it will be and the better it will rank. Greater detail is provided in the
manual, but here are a few things to consider…
Quality hosting service*
Secure HTTPS domain*
Content delivery network*
Simple javascript and CSS*
Use browser caching*
Easy to navigate menu
No duplicate content
Remove dead links
Optimize image size
Only essential plugins
* Only required if self-hosting your website
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 6 --

• Free Website Speed Tester (10xresource.com/seo32)
• Google Page Speed Insights (10xresource.com/seo31)
• WP Optimize WordPress Plugin (10xresource.com/seo35)
• Let's Encrypt Free HTTPS (10xresource.com/seo17)
Recommended Resource:
• Google Keyword Tool (10xresource.com/seo4)
• Moz Keyword Research Tool (10xresource.com/seo11)
Recommended Resource:
CONDUCT KEYWORD RESEARCH AND CHOOSE PHRASES	STEP
4
Selecting the right keywords is critical to success. It is recommended that you
use a spreadsheet to stay organized. Ultimately, you will want one primary
keyword phrase for each page on your website or piece of content you create.
SUBMIT WEBSITE TO ANY RELEVANT DIRECTORIES	STEP
5
While most link building will be done with ongoing effort and content,
directories are set up once and can be permanent. We provide more detail in
the manual, but here are some ideas…
Bing Places
Facebook Page
Yelp Listing
Local Directories
Niche Directories
Travel Directories
BBB, D&B, etc
Chamber of Commerce
Yellow Pages
Note that not all directories will be relevant to all businesses.

-- 3 of 6 --

• Webpage Optimization Tutorial (10xresource.com/seo5)
• Onpage Linking Flowchart (10xdownload.com/seo2)
• Onpage and Offpage Checklist (10xdownload.com/seo5)
• SEO Content Swipe File (10xdownload.com/seo7)
• Yoast SEO WordPress Plugin (10xresource.com/seo36)
Recommended Resource:
OPTIMIZE PAGES AND CREATE LINKING STRATEGY	STEP
6
There is much work to do to ensure your site is completely “onpage”
optimized. You will want to look at each page individually, ensuring that the
content on your pages, as well as the metadata, is reflecting your desired
keyword phrases. You will then want to be sure that your pages are
interconnected with strategically placed links. We provide great detail in the
manual, flowcharts, and checklists.
• Content Creation Flowchart (10xdownload.com/seo4)
• Offpage Linking Flowchart (10xdownload.com/seo3)
• SEMrush Backlinking Tool (10xresource.com/seo12)
• Answer the Public Idea Generator (10xresource.com/seo16)
• Buzzstream Outreach Tool (10xresource.com/seo33)
• Hunter Email Extraction Tool (10xresource.com/seo34)
• Google Alerts Notifications (10xresource.com/seo29)
• Help a Reporter Out (HARO) (10xresource.com/seo30)
Recommended Resource:
CREATE ONGOING CONTENT AND BACKLINKS	STEP
7
The work of “offpage” optimization comes in the form of link building. Some
links will come from content you create in places like social media, press
releases, and guest blog posts. Other links will require creativity and a
well-orchestrated reach-out effort to be earned. The quantity and quality of
these links is the largest determining factor in your ranking.

-- 4 of 6 --

• SEO Quake Chrome Extension (10xresource.com/seo13)
• Google Maintaining SEO (10xresource.com/seo20)
• Google Official Company Blog (10xresource.com/seo26)
• Google Search Central Blog (10xresource.com/seo14)
• Google Search Podcast (10xresource.com/seo28)
• Google FAQ for Crawling (10xresource.com/seo23)
• Google FAQ for Ranking (10xresource.com/seo24)
• Google FAQ for Results (10xresource.com/seo25)
Recommended Resource:
REGULARLY REVIEW RANKING REPORTS AND ADJUST	STEP
8
SEO is an ongoing battle, so keep an eye on things and adjust as needed.
Look for any ranking increase or decrease in any of your primary terms. Also,
look for unexpected terms that rank. And when they do, put effort into
getting them to the top. Most importantly, make sure your website is ready to
capture leads and convert sales from your free traffic!
